children.name: Paraphyllina
children.description: Paraphyllina — a genus of paraphyllinid jellyfish in the family Paraphyllinidae.

children.name: Paraphyllina intermedia
children.description: Paraphyllina intermedia is a crown jellyfish in the family Paraphyllinidae.

children.name: Paraphyllina ransoni
children.description: Paraphyllina ransoni is a species of crown jellyfish within the family Paraphyllinidae.

children.name: Paraphyllina rubra
children.description: Paraphyllina rubra is a species of crown jellyfish in the family Paraphyllinidae.
